commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a non-interactive legacy cron repair call to doctor config preflight and refactors the existing doctor cron repair implementation so prompted doctor and preflight share the import, normalize, save, run-log migration, and archive path.

PR surface: Source +107, Tests +12. Total +119 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main reads cron jobs from SQLite while docs/current doctor repair require explicit doctor --fix for legacy JSON import, matching the linked upgrade report. I did not execute the packaged upgrade path because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer acceptance of the compatibility-sensitive automatic migration behavior, not a narrow repair that ClawSweeper should apply automatically.
